value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade `@base-ui/react` in `@cycle/ui` from 1.5.0 to 1.6.0.

## Affected manifest

- `packages/ui/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports a minor release for Base UI. Since Base UI backs reusable UI primitives, this should include visual and interaction smoke testing for affected components.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui storybook:build`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop build` to catch downstream integration issues.
- Smoke test UI primitives that use Base UI behavior, especially dialogs, popovers, menus, tabs, and focus handling.
value.title: Upgrade Base UI React to 1.6.0
